---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem to help us improve ClipToAll
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Press the capture hotkey (e.g. Alt+X)
2. Select region '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 Pro 23H2, build 22631]
- ClipToAll version: [e.g. 5.1.14]
- Display / DPI setup: [e.g. 3840x2160 at 150% scaling]
- Multi-monitor: [e.g. single monitor / 2 monitors with mixed DPI]
- GPU (if relevant): [e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3060]

## Logs

Paste any relevant log output here. Wrap logs in a code block:

```
(logs here)
```

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
